header_14.raw_response: Competition can be both motivating and stressful, depending on the context and individual. For me, competition is generally more motivating than stressful. Therefore, I would place competition closer to the motivating end of the spectrum, acknowledging that it has more positive impacts than negative ones in my life.

header_15.raw_response: Glass is known for its dual nature. On one hand, it can be incredibly durable, especially when it's thick and well-made. Given my experiences and understanding of glass, I would place it closer to the middle of the spectrum. header_16.raw_response: Given my experiences and perspective, I would place the aircraft engine closer to the focus side of the spectrum.
